allow: Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(s\);const bad=j.articles.filter\(a=>/&#?\\w+;/.test\(a.title\)\);console.log\('articles:',j.count,'| titles still containing raw entities:',bad.length\); if\(bad[0]\)console.log\('example:',bad[0].title\)}\)")

Bash(SUMMARY_PROVIDER= GEMINI_API_KEY=fake-key node -e "import\('./server/summarize.js'\).then\(async m=>{ console.log\('detected provider:', m.summaryProvider\(\)\); const r=await m.summarize\([{url:'http://x/1',title:'Test headline about markets',source:'Test',snippet:'ctx'}]\); console.log\('summarize returned \(bad key → graceful\):', JSON.stringify\(r\)\); }\)")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001,5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/summarize -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"articles":[{"url":"https://test/knicks","title":"Knicks and Fans Salute Each Other at Joyous Championship Parade","source":"NYT","snippet":"Tens of thousands gathered in Manhattan as the Knicks celebrated their first title in decades with a parade up Broadway."}]}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/summarize -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"articles":[{"url":"https://t/1","title":"Knicks Salute Fans at Joyous Championship Parade","source":"NYT","snippet":"Tens of thousands gathered in Manhattan as the Knicks celebrated their first NBA title in decades with a parade up Broadway."},{"url":"https://t/2","title":"Senate passes sweeping budget bill after marathon session","source":"The Hill","snippet":"The bill funds the government through next year and includes tax provisions."}]}')
